creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
In case another exp run worth it, here are the updated diff for ports
updates and the shar for new ports:
http://people.freebsd.org/~romain/mono-2.10.2_1.diff
http://people.freebsd.org/~romain/mono-2.10.2_1.shar

I added updates for deskutils/tomboy, multimedia/banshee (still BROKEN)
and mail/gmime24 (which may affect 7 ports according to freshports [1])

Romain

References:
  1. http://www.freshports.org/search.php?stype=depends_all&method=match&query=mail/gmime24

-- 
Romain Tartière <romain@FreeBSD.org>  http://people.FreeBSD.org/~romain/
pgp: 8234 9A78 E7C0 B807 0B59  80FF BA4D 1D95 5112 336F (ID: 0x5112336F)
(plain text =non-HTML= PGP/GPG encrypted/signed e-mail much appreciated)
